Build-Depends: debhelper-compat (= 13), dh-sequence-rust, help2man <!nodoc>, librust-clap-dev, librust-codemap-dev, librust-getrandom-dev, librust-indexmap-dev, librust-lasso-dev, librust-once-cell-dev, librust-paste-dev, librust-phf+phf-macros-dev, librust-phf-dev, librust-quote-dev, librust-rand-dev, librust-syn-dev, librust-tempfile-dev, librust-wasm-bindgen-dev, libstd-rust-dev, libstring-shellquote-perl <!nodoc>
Description: Sass compiler written purely in Rust grass provides functionality for compiling Sass to CSS, targeting compatibility with the reference implementation in Dart.
Package-List: librust-grass-dev deb rust optional arch=all sass-grass deb web optional arch=any
